violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ware washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The hand sink in the women's bathroom was not operable. Per interview with PIC, work order has been submitted. Handwashing will be done at other hand-washing sink until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service at time of inspection. PIC informed that all dishes from bar to be washed, rinsed and sanitized at dishwasher in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the popcorn maker have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The floor and wall coving in the following areas is in poor repair, inspector observed missing pieces with incomplete seal. 1. Mop sink (wall & floor) 2. Dry storage (wall) The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025

Fish pans were observed stored under the paper towel dispenser next to the handwashing sink. Equipment must not be stored next to areas subject to splash. Metal plates were relocated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The floor behind the bar dishwasher had an accumulation of water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
